params.description: 3×5 dot array appears at center of screen.

params.label: rows: 3 rows of 5
params.description: Equation 3 × 5 = 15 appears below array on the left, labeled 'rows: 3 rows of 5'.

params.label: columns: 5 columns of 3
params.description: Equation 5 × 3 = 15 appears below array on the right, labeled 'columns: 5 columns of 3'.

beats.text: Here's an array you've worked with. Described by rows, it's 3 times 5 equals 15. Described by columns, it's 5 times 3 equals 15. Look at both equations. What do you notice about the products?
What's true for these two equations?

validator.description: Student selected A: The products are both 15, correct

beats.text: You noticed it's the same array, two descriptions, same product. Interesting, right? We'll dig into that next time.

elements.description: Equation 3 × 5 = 15 shown on left, labeled 'rows: 3 rows of 5'.
